title: Candle Range Theory Tool
subtitle: ATR-Based Candle Classification: Large Range / Small Range / Inside Bar / Outside Bar
author: Christian Benjamin (lynnchris)
verdict: HIGH EXTRACT — Candle Range Theory (CRT) 4-class classification is a direct pre-filter for our entry gate. Small Range candles signal compression → breakout likely. Inside Bars signal consolidation. Large Range = expansion (momentum). All ATR-normalized and instrument-agnostic.

core_concept.name: Candle Range Theory (CRT)
core_concept.description: Classify every completed candle into one of 4 mutually exclusive types based on True Range vs ATR.

four_types.LR: Large Range: TR >= largeMult * ATR (default 1.5×) — expansion candle, strong directional move
four_types.SR: Small Range: TR <= smallMult * ATR (default 0.5×) — compression, low energy, setup forming
four_types.IB: Inside Bar: high < prev_high AND low > prev_low — consolidation inside prior range
four_types.OB: Outside Bar: high > prev_high AND low < prev_low — engulfs prior range

core_concept.relevance_to_creviaderiv: SR candles before a zone touch = setup compression = breakout imminent. LR departure candle = highest quality departure. IB at zone = consolidation before continuation. OB = volatility spike, skip (no directional clarity).

classification_logic.priority: IB and OB are mutually exclusive structural patterns. LR and SR are range-based. Check IB/OB first as they override.
classification_logic.code: is_ib = high[i] < high[i-1] and low[i] > low[i-1]; is_ob = high[i] > high[i-1] and low[i] < low[i-1]; is_lr = tr[i] >= large_mult * atr[i]; is_sr = tr[i] <= small_mult * atr[i]

signal_implications.LR_departure: Strong momentum — highest confidence departure candle
signal_implications.SR_pre_zone: Compression before touch — setup building, zone likely to hold
signal_implications.IB_at_zone: Consolidation — price absorbed by zone, continuation pending
signal_implications.OB_skip: Engulfs prior range — too noisy, no directional clarity

keep: 4-class CRT system (LR, SR, IB, OB) with ATR normalization
True Range formula using prev_close gap
Classification at every bar (pre-filter for entry gate)
improve: Add CRT context to zone interaction: log candle_type for the zone-touch bar
SR sequence detection: 3+ consecutive SR candles before zone = high compression = strong signal expected
LR departure: if departure candle is LR → departure_strength = 4 (highest, above marubozu=3)

creviaderiv_integration.pre_entry_filter: candle_type = classify_crt(bar, prev_bar, atr); if candle_type == 'OB': skip (no direction); if candle_type in ('LR','SR','IB'): continue to gate chain
creviaderiv_integration.departure_strength_upgrade: if departure_candle_type == 'LR': departure_strength = 4; elif pattern in (MARUBOZU): departure_strength = 3; ...
creviaderiv_integration.compression_signal: if last 3 bars are SR: signal_confidence += 10 (compression before zone touch = tighter coil)
